message:
conformance(bd-23uk): add Hash, List, Set, Sorted Set fixture suites

Add four new conformance fixture suites exercising the multi-type data
support landed in the previous commit:

- core_hash.json: 23 cases covering HSET, HGET, HDEL, HEXISTS, HLEN,
  HMSET, HMGET, HINCRBY, HSETNX, HSTRLEN, WRONGTYPE cross-checks
- core_list.json: 18 cases covering LPUSH, RPUSH, LPOP, RPOP, LLEN,
  LRANGE, LINDEX, LSET, WRONGTYPE cross-checks
- core_set.json: 15 cases covering SADD, SREM, SMEMBERS, SCARD,
  SISMEMBER, SINTER, SUNION, SDIFF, WRONGTYPE cross-checks
- core_zset.json: 19 cases covering ZADD, ZSCORE, ZCARD, ZRANK,
  ZREVRANK, ZRANGE, ZREVRANGE, ZRANGEBYSCORE, ZCOUNT, ZINCRBY, ZREM,
  WRONGTYPE cross-checks

All 14 conformance tests pass (10 existing + 4 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
